misconfig_patterns: No auth in default deployment — all databases and tables publicly accessible
statusCode:200 in every response body regardless of auth state

active_probe.false_positive_check: response must include statusCode, message, and result fields — medium FP risk on port 8888

deployment_tells: Port 8888 is shared with Jupyter — require body confirmation
All responses include statusCode:200 + message + result JSON structure
No authentication prompt on any endpoint in default deployment
pivot_paths: POST /api/{db}/data/get → full record retrieval without auth
